title: Settings
description: Enable or disable modules and tailor your experience.

language.title: Application language
language.description: Choose the language used in the interface.

theme.title: Appearance
theme.description: Pick the theme that best matches your viewing comfort.

errors.missingKey: Encryption key missing: please sign in again to recover your settings.
errors.keyMissingAction: Encryption key missing. Sign in again before changing modules.
errors.configUnreadable: Module settings unreadable — sign in again before changing them (don't overwrite).

modules.title: Module activation
modules.description: Choose which spaces remain available in Nodea.

wipe.title: Wipe all {module} entries?
wipe.description: Irreversible. The module stays enabled but every encrypted entry it owns is deleted from the server. Type your password to confirm.
wipe.failedPartial: Failed midway. Already wiped: {wiped}. Run it again to finish.
